# Indica et Buddhica — critical editions (registry only)

**Homepage:** https://indica-et-buddhica.com/
**Repositorium:** https://indica-et-buddhica.org/repositorium (HTTP
ECONNREFUSED at fetch time; intermittent).
**License:** "© 2015–26 Indica et Buddhica Publishers". The publisher
distributes monographs, critical editions and TEI-encoded primary
sources; no single open licence covers the catalogue. Each individual
critical edition has its own licence statement on its product page.

## Status

Registry-only. The publisher's repository was offline at fetch time
(`ECONNREFUSED`); the homepage advertises the following text classes:

- Jātakanidāna (critical edition, translation, study).
- South Indian Epigraphy and Art History (2-volume series).
- Chinese Calligraphy and Early Buddhist Manuscripts.
- Bodhisattvamārga materials.
- TEI-encoded Pali and Sanskrit Buddhist materials.

No direct download URLs were resolvable on this run. Manifest entry
records `fetch_status: "blocked"`, `fetch_blocker:
"server_unreachable_on_2026-05-19; per-text license must be confirmed via
publisher contact"`. A future run should retry the Repositorium endpoint
and contact `indica-et-buddhica@indica-et-buddhica.com` for the TEI
inventory.
